userRoles.name: KitchenEmployee
userRoles.description: User role for kitchen employees to view and manage orders.

userRoles.name: TicketMaster
userRoles.description: User role for ticket masters to manage order status and labels.

userRoles.name: Cashier
userRoles.description: User role for cashiers to manage orders, payments, and customer information.

userRoles.name: RestaurantOwner
userRoles.description: User role for restaurant owners to view order overviews, sales reports, and manage cashier accounts.

userRoles.name: HomeDeliveryPerson
userRoles.description: User role for home delivery persons to view order details and delivery information.

userRoles.name: Admin
userRoles.description: User role for administrators to manage all aspects of the application.

content.text: Overview and data management for order.
Manage order records and open the create dialog when new data is needed.
Manage product records and open the create dialog when new data is needed.
Manage customer records and open the create dialog when new data is needed.
Manage ticket records and open the create dialog when new data is needed.
